case_title: PACIFIC CREDITORS ASSOCIATION VS. FELISA BONIFACIO YAMBO et al

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC CREDITORS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAMBO, FELISA BONIFACIO YAMBAO, EMILIANA $3,795.00 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $519.86 INTEREST, $347.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,461.86, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT FELISA BONIFACIO YAMBAO'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED FOR LACK OF SERVICE PURSUANT TO CCP 473(D). DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT THE ADDRESS AT WHICH PLAINTIFF ATTEMPTED SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS NOT HER RESIDENCE OR MAILING ADDRESS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT FELISA BONIFACIO YAMBAO'S Motion To Vacate Default Judgment IS GRANTED FOR LACK OF SERVICE PURSUANT TO CCP 473(d). DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT THE ADDRESS AT WHICH PLAINTIFF ATTEMPTED SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS NOT HER RESIDENCE OR MAILING ADDRESS. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
